scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'if [ -n "$EAS_BUILD" ] || [ "$CI" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.eas-build-pre-install:
npm install -g pnpm@10.26.1 && printf 'packages:
  - artifacts/siyaj
  - lib/api-client-react
  - lib/api-zod
  - lib/api-spec
' > pnpm-workspace.yaml && rm -f pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && JAVA17=$(find /usr/lib/jvm /usr/local/lib/jvm /usr/java 2>/dev/null -maxdepth 3 -name 'javac' | grep -E '(17|21|temurin)' | head -1 | sed 's|/bin/javac||') && if [ -n "$JAVA17" ]; then mkdir -p ~/.gradle && echo "org.gradle.java.home=$JAVA17" >> ~/.gradle/gradle.properties && echo "Java home set to $JAVA17"; else echo 'Java 17 not found, trying update-java-alternatives' && sudo update-java-alternatives -s java-1.17.0-openjdk-amd64 2>/dev/null || true; fi && echo 'EAS pre-install complete'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
